title: Spell Preparation Helper
description: Guides players through choosing which spells to prepare each day. Triggered automatically after a long rest, it shows the character's prepared spells in a dialog and lets them adjust the list — wizards prepare from their spellbook, while clerics, druids, paladins, and rangers prepare from the full class spell list available in the world. Enforces each class's prepared-spell limit. For D&D 5e 2024 rules.
